indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is a significant obstacle to setting up a computer workstation, as it takes up a large portion of the space and obstructs access to the window.

indicators.name: large window
indicators.rationale: The large window allows natural light to enter, which can be beneficial for reducing eye strain and improving mood.

indicators.name: cabinet
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface available for setting up a computer workstation, as the cabinet is too low and does not provide enough space for a keyboard and monitor.

indicators.name: rug
indicators.rationale: The rug is soft and may make it difficult to set up a stable and ergonomic workstation.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). While the large window provides natural light, the presence of the bed and the lack of a flat surface for a workstation make it challenging to set up a comfortable and efficient workspace. The cabinet is too low and the rug is soft, further hindering the setup process.
